features: The information below is per-pack only
The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Our 1st Aerosol-Free & Best Ever Automatic Spray System
Imagine clean laundry blowing in a breeze filled with the crisp scent of apple blossom, orange flowers and natural cotton
Infused with Natural Essential Oils & 95% Naturally Derived Ingredients
Neutralize Pet, Kitchen and Bathroom odours for up to 70 days per refill
Contains 1 Device, 1 Refill and 2 AA Batteries
description: Product Description Air Wick 24/7 Active Fresh is Air Wick's first aerosolfree and best ever automatic air freshener. Our latest odour neutraliser is infused with natural essential oils for long lasting fragrance to banish tough odours for up to 70 days. Tackle dog, bathroom and kitchen smells with your choice of 3x intensity settings, plus an instant action boost button. Ensure you place your 24/7 Active Fresh above 6ft for an optimum performance and room fill. Air Wick is a proud partner of WWK UK, working to restore UK wildflower habitats. Air Wick is raising £400,000 per year for WWFUK for wildflowers conservation projects (WWFUK Trading Ltd pays all taxable profits to WWFUK charity registered in England & Wales 1081247, Scotland SC039593) Ingredients Alcohol
